action_groups.name: Offensive
action_groups.description: These are actions that are taken with the intent to cause harm to another target, whether it be lethal or non-lethal damage.
rules: After taking an action with the offensive action trait, any following offensive actions take an additional -5 penalty to their total roll.

action_groups.name: Maneuver
action_groups.description: These are actions that need you to be able to have your movement or body unhindered. These actions may range from charging full speed into the enemy, or dodging an attack.

action_groups.name: Utility Actions
action_groups.description: Actions that bolster allies or hinder foes. They rarely deal direct damage, but improve positioning, rolls, survivability, or tempo.

action_groups.name: General Actions
action_groups.description: Universal actions available to all characters that don't depend on special training or class features.

action_groups.name: Narrative Actions
action_groups.description: Light, low-impact activities used primarily for expression, exploration, or minor interaction. They generally cost little or no AP and are limited by context rather than mechanics.

action_groups.name: Passive
action_groups.description: Always-active abilities that function automatically unless you're downed, unconscious, or dead. Passives are active all the time and do not require AP to use.

action_groups.name: Triggers
action_groups.description: Reactive abilities that activate when specific conditions are met. Each trigger can only activate once per round but may chain-activate other triggers. Feats or abilities that list abilities that are triggers will state whether or not they consume AP.

actions.name: Weapon Strike
actions.description: Make a standard weapon attack against a target's Armor defense. Applies to melee and ranged weapons unless otherwise specified.
actions.description_markdown: Make a standard weapon attack against a target's Armor defense. Applies to melee and ranged weapons unless otherwise specified.
actions.critical: Deal damage equal to half of weapon's max damage (e.g. 2d6 on crit deals an additional 6). Dual wielding: two attack rolls, add modifier once.

actions.name: Dual Strike
actions.description: Make one attack with each wielded weapon. Take -5 penalty to both attacks and no attribute damage modifiers. If both weapons have the light trait, you may add your attribute damage modifiers to each attack.
actions.description_markdown: Make one attack with each wielded weapon. Take -5 penalty to both attacks and no attribute damage modifiers. If both weapons have the light trait, you may add your attribute damage modifiers to each attack.

actions.name: Power Strike
actions.description: Attack once with a Weapon Strike or Cast a Spell casting a Cantrip dealing damage. On a hit roll 2 times the amount of dice rolled for damage of dice; modifiers, enchantments, and augmentations are unaffected. This attack is made at a -5 penalty.
actions.description_markdown: Attack once with a Weapon Strike or Cast a Spell casting a Cantrip dealing damage. On a hit roll 2 times the amount of dice rolled for damage of dice; modifiers, enchantments, and augmentations are unaffected. This attack is made at a -5 penalty.

actions.name: Rebound Strike
actions.required: Failed Power Strike this turn using a Weapon
actions.description: Come back again for a quick and dirty attack. On success, deal half weapon damage and modifiers. On critical, deal normal damage without critical damage bonus.
actions.description_markdown: Come back again for a quick and dirty attack. On success, deal half weapon damage and modifiers. On critical, deal normal damage without critical damage bonus.

actions.name: Cast a Spell
actions.required: Have a Spellcasting feat or casting a Vellum with a Spell with a Tier of 1 or higher.
actions.description: Activate a spell from your list of prepared or known spells. This includes direct, zone, or utility spells unless otherwise specified by the spell.
actions.description_markdown: Activate a spell from your list of prepared or known spells. This includes direct, zone, or utility spells unless otherwise specified by the spell.

actions.name: Snap Cantrip
actions.required: Used Cast a Spell action this turn
actions.description: Use a Cantrip after you have taken the Cast a Spell action.
actions.description_markdown: Use a Cantrip after you have taken the Cast a Spell action.

actions.name: Alchemical Item (Enemy)
actions.description: Use an alchemical item on a target that would intend to cause harm, adversarial effects or conditions. Make either a ranged or melee attack roll against the target's Armor.
actions.description_markdown: Use an alchemical item on a target that would intend to cause harm, adversarial effects or conditions. Make either a ranged or melee attack roll against the target's Armor.

actions.name: Grapple
actions.description: Make a Body check against the Body defense of a target that is the same size as you or one size smaller.
actions.description_markdown: Make a Body check against the Body defense of a target that is the same size as you or one size smaller.

outcomes.effect: You may knock the target Prone instead of restraining them.

actions.name: Shield Bash
actions.description: If wielding a shield, make a single attack using your shield based upon its type. No damage modifier is applied if you do not have proficiency with shields.
actions.description_markdown: If wielding a shield, make a single attack using your shield based upon its type. No damage modifier is applied if you do not have proficiency with shields.

actions.name: Shove
actions.description: Attempt to push a creature of equal or lesser size using a Body against the target's Body defense. Can push a target out of an engagement, or close distance on a critical success.
actions.description_markdown: Attempt to push a creature of equal or lesser size using a Body against the target's Body defense. Can push a target out of an engagement, or close distance on a critical success.

actions.name: Trip
actions.description: Make a Body check against the target's Body defense. On success, the target is knocked Prone.
actions.description_markdown: Make a Body check against the target's Body defense. On success, the target is knocked Prone.

actions.name: Dash
actions.description: Move to an adjacent zone. Upon entering a new zone, you may freely reposition within that zone unless you become Engaged.
actions.description_markdown: Move to an adjacent zone. Upon entering a new zone, you may freely reposition within that zone unless you become Engaged.

actions.name: Disengage
actions.description: Break free from an engagement. After disengaging, reposition anywhere within the zone that is reasonably reachable without changing zones. You cannot be targeted by a Held Action when you use Disengage.
actions.description_markdown: Break free from an engagement. After disengaging, reposition anywhere within the zone that is reasonably reachable without changing zones. You cannot be targeted by a Held Action when you use Disengage.

actions.name: Dodge
actions.description: Adopt a defensive stance. Until the end of your next turn, enemies targeting you have Strain on attacks and spell attacks against you.
actions.description_markdown: Adopt a defensive stance. Until the end of your next turn, enemies targeting you have Strain on attacks and spell attacks against you.

actions.name: Hide
actions.description: Make a Stealth check (d20 + Body modifiers) against a target's Mind defense to become Unaware or Hidden to that target. On a critical success, gain +3 to Body defense against Scan actions.
actions.description_markdown: Make a Stealth check (d20 + Body modifiers) against a target's Mind defense to become Unaware or Hidden to that target. On a critical success, gain +3 to Body defense against Scan actions.

actions.name: Jump
actions.description: Leap across a gap, up to a ledge, or to a location requiring a might or dexterity check. Used for overcoming obstacles or reaching terrain.
actions.description_markdown: Leap across a gap, up to a ledge, or to a location requiring a might or dexterity check. Used for overcoming obstacles or reaching terrain.

actions.name: Aid
actions.description: Attempt to remove or mitigate a condition affecting an ally. Requires a relevant skill check (e.g., medicine, vigor, or essence).
actions.description_markdown: Attempt to remove or mitigate a condition affecting an ally. Requires a relevant skill check (e.g., medicine, vigor, or essence).

actions.name: Alchemical Item (Ally)
actions.description: Use an alchemical item on an ally other than yourself, and does not have any hostile or adversarial effects or conditions.
actions.description_markdown: Use an alchemical item on an ally other than yourself, and does not have any hostile or adversarial effects or conditions.

actions.name: Assist
actions.description: Grant an ally within touch range Resolve on their next non-combative roll. Cannot be used more than once per 10 minutes per target.
actions.description_markdown: Grant an ally within touch range Resolve on their next non-combative roll. Cannot be used more than once per 10 minutes per target.

actions.name: Distract
actions.description: Choose a target within close range. Select one of the target's defenses (Body, Mind, or Will). Make a check using the matching attribute. On a success, the target suffers Strain on their next check using that defense.
actions.description_markdown: Choose a target within close range. Select one of the target's defenses (Body, Mind, or Will). Make a check using the matching attribute. On a success, the target suffers Strain on their next check using that defense.

actions.name: Flank
actions.description: Choose a target you are engaged with. The next ally who attacks that target gains Resolve on their attack roll.
actions.description_markdown: Choose a target you are engaged with. The next ally who attacks that target gains Resolve on their attack roll.

actions.name: Scan
actions.description: Use Scan to locate creatures attempting to hide or remain hidden.
actions.description_markdown:
Use Scan to locate creatures attempting to hide or remain hidden.

**Check:** d20 + Mind modifier + bonuses to Checks vs. target's Stealth DC (10 + Body modifier + Stealth/Body bonuses)

*Scan can only be used to find Hidden or Unaware creatures. It cannot be used to search for environmental clues — use Perception for that.*

outcomes.effect: The target's visibility state improves one step relative to you: Hidden → Unaware → Visible
The target becomes Visible to you and all of your allies.

actions.name: Perception
actions.description: Use Perception to observe, examine, or interpret your surroundings.
actions.description_markdown:
Use Perception to observe, examine, or interpret your surroundings. Make a Mind (Awareness) skill check.

**Uses:** Investigate a scene, search for physical or environmental clues, read emotional cues or determine if someone is lying, notice subtle details, sounds, or movements not related to Stealth.

*Perception cannot reveal Hidden or Unaware creatures.*

actions.name: Brace
actions.description: Gain +2 to attacks for weapons, and +2 to armor bonus for shields with the brace trait until end of your next turn.
actions.description_markdown: Gain +2 to attacks for weapons, and +2 to armor bonus for shields with the brace trait until end of your next turn.

actions.name: Alchemical Item (Self)
actions.description: Use an alchemical on yourself.
actions.description_markdown: Use an alchemical on yourself.

actions.name: Cover
actions.description: Move into or out of a protective position in your current zone to gain or leave a cover bonus.
actions.description_markdown: Move into or out of a protective position in your current zone to gain or leave a cover bonus.

actions.name: Skill Use (Complex)
actions.description: Perform a demanding or involved Skill Check, such as lockpicking, disabling traps, or deciphering magical runes.
actions.description_markdown: Perform a demanding or involved Skill Check, such as lockpicking, disabling traps, or deciphering magical runes.

actions.name: Stand
actions.description: Stand up from the prone position. Once standing, you lose the Prone condition.
actions.description_markdown: Stand up from the prone position. Once standing, you lose the Prone condition.

actions.name: Go Prone
actions.description: Drop to the ground to gain half cover against ranged attacks, and gain the Prone condition.
actions.description_markdown: Drop to the ground to gain half cover against ranged attacks, and gain the Prone condition.

actions.name: Command

notes: Cost increases to 3 AP after first use, resets to 1 AP at start of next turn.

actions.description: You issue commands to a summoned creature or pet, expending your AP instead of theirs to perform actions of 2 AP or less. Cost to use Command increases to 3 AP after first use, and resets to 1 AP at start of next turn.
actions.description_markdown: You issue commands to a summoned creature or pet, expending your AP instead of theirs to perform actions of 2 AP or less. Cost to use Command increases to 3 AP after first use, and resets to 1 AP at start of next turn.

actions.name: Recollection
actions.description: Use Lore skill check to uncover, remember, or analyze information relevant to the scene or target.
actions.description_markdown: Use Lore skill check to uncover, remember, or analyze information relevant to the scene or target.

actions.name: Persuade / Deceive / Interrogate
actions.description: Make a Social (Will) skill check against a chosen target. The DC is equal to the target's Tier, unless the creature is immune to charm or social influence. If the target is hostile, increase the Difficulty Tier by 1 (maximum Tier 7).
actions.description_markdown: Make a Social (Will) skill check against a chosen target. The DC is equal to the target's Tier, unless the creature is immune to charm or social influence. If the target is hostile, increase the Difficulty Tier by 1 (maximum Tier 7).

actions.name: Interact

notes: First use per turn is free; further uses cost 1 AP.

actions.description: Manipulate small objects such as doors, levers, or drawing a weapon. This can only be done once per turn at no cost, and further uses of Interact cost 1 AP.
actions.description_markdown: Manipulate small objects such as doors, levers, or drawing a weapon. This can only be done once per turn at no cost, and further uses of Interact cost 1 AP.

actions.name: Speak / Gesture
actions.description: Give verbal commands, communicate intentions, or signal allies.
actions.description_markdown: Give verbal commands, communicate intentions, or signal allies.

actions.name: Held Action (Declare)
actions.description: You pause your turn to wait for a specific event. When you declare a Held Action, you must describe your trigger and the action you are holding. You may only hold an action after you have finished any actions you wish to take this turn.
actions.description_markdown:
You pause your turn to wait for a specific event. When you declare a Held Action, you must describe your trigger and the action you are holding. You may only hold an action after you have finished any actions you wish to take this turn.

- You cannot take further actions or spend AP until the trigger occurs.
- You must still have enough AP remaining to perform the held action.
- If the trigger does not occur before the start of your next turn, the held AP is lost.
- If the creature or object you were waiting for is removed from play, the Held Action ends with no effect.
- Triggers from feats, spell effects, or other abilities may still activate normally while you are holding an action.
